summary: Comprehensive testing of SSE Tool Activity UI feature completed. Backend: All 7 pytest tests passed (SSE streaming, tool_activity field in responses, event types). Frontend: ToolActivityLive component shows during processing with 'Thinking running' spinner, ToolActivitySummary shows '2 tools used' on completed AI messages with expandable details (tool names with checkmarks and substeps).
passed_tests: Backend: SSE endpoint returns text/event-stream content-type
Backend: SSE stream includes 'thinking' and 'done' events
Backend: SSE stream includes 'tool_start', 'substep', 'tool_end' events when tools are called
Backend: 'done' event includes ai_message with tool_activity array
Backend: GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns messages with tool_activity field
Backend: tool_activity structure is correct (tool, label, status, substeps)
Backend: New conversation creation returns welcome message
Frontend: ToolActivityLive (data-testid='tool-activity-live') shows during processing with 'Thinking running' spinner
Frontend: ToolActivitySummary (data-testid='tool-activity-summary') shows '2 tools used' on completed AI messages
Frontend: Clicking tool summary expands to show tool names with checkmarks (grammar_check, vocabulary_lookup)
Frontend: Expanded view shows substeps (Scanning for errors, Looking up definition, Generating examples)
Frontend: Text input mode toggle (keyboard icon) works correctly
Frontend: Messages can be typed and sent in text mode
Frontend: New conversation creation works with welcome message
seed_data_creation: Created Spanish learning conversation (64548d4f-90da-4ea0-b835-3cca1565f175) with 5 messages including 2 that triggered grammar_check and vocabulary_lookup tools
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE Tool Activity UI fully tested. Key data-testids: 'tool-activity-live' (shows during processing), 'tool-activity-summary' (shows on completed AI messages). Tool events flow: thinking → tool_start → substep → tool_end → done. The LLM decides whether to use tools - not every message triggers tools. Test conversation 64548d4f-90da-4ea0-b835-3cca1565f175 has messages with tool_activity data.

sse_streaming.done_payload: includes user_message and ai_message with tool_activity

ToolActivityLive.shows_when: message is being processed and tools are running
ToolActivityLive.displays: Thinking with spinner, tool names with running/done status

ToolActivitySummary.expanded: Shows tool names with checkmarks and substeps
